chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: 5817 - اِتَّقُوا اَلنَّارَ وَ لَوْ بِشِقِّ تَمْرَةٍ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.5817 - The Prophet (sw) said; "Protect yourselves from the Fire, even if it is with half a date." (showing the enormous merits of even the modest acts of Charity or 'Sadaqa')
